## Added
- **Minecraft 1.21.11 support — Fabric and NeoForge.** Enhanced Movement is now available for 1.21.11 with full feature parity: double jump with smart fall-damage protection, directional dash (double-tap WASD or a dedicated keybind), in-air dash, ledge grab, and the Sandevistan-style dash afterimages — stable per-ghost render state, dithered noise-texture trail, prism mode, and shader-pack-compatible emissive rendering.

## Notes
- Requires **Java 21**. The Fabric build needs Fabric API (Mod Menu optional, for the in-game config screen).
